apps.name: GlassWalk
apps.subtitle: Liquid-glass walking tracker.
apps.localizedDescription: A beautiful walking tracker using your iPhone's real sensors - accurate steps, GPS route, live map, weather, streaks and insights. All data stays on your device.

versions.localizedDescription: ORI AI hub: chat, voice journaling, and photo/OCR understanding through your own Gemini key. Journal entries can be edited, get continuous follow-up thoughts, and can be summarized or rephrased with one tap. Home and Dashboard now sit over a real forest photo with calmer, more compact cards. Walk was redesigned with a lighter glass-style map, and a pace-jitter bug (pace swinging wildly while standing still) is fixed.

AI, powered by your own Gemini API key (add it in Profile). Insights gets an AI-written summary of your real stats. A new Coach screen lets you ask questions about your walk history, grounded only in your real data. Walk Reports can get a grounded AI comment on a photo you add. Nothing is sent anywhere unless you add a key, and it's never uploaded anywhere but Google's API.

Map intelligence: frequented-streets heatmap, route replay with pace-tinted playback, and auto route-matching that recognizes a repeated loop. Deeper intelligence: weather-vs-performance, personal distance forecast, monthly wrap card, and streak-reminder notifications (with an in-app explainer before the permission prompt). Live Walk now dims its HUD after 30s idle to save battery.
Mobility: if connecting to Apple Health fails, the exact error is now shown on screen, and a Reconnect Apple Health button was added at the bottom of the Mobility panel.
Fixes Apple Health connection: the permission sheet now appears and your mobility data flows in. Update, open Insights > Mobility and tap Connect Apple Health.

Apple Health Mobility. A new Mobility panel reads the gait metrics your iPhone already measures: walking steadiness with Apple's OK/Low/Very Low bands, walking speed, step length, double support, asymmetry, six-minute-walk estimate and stair speeds — months of history appear the moment you connect. Read-only, per-metric permission, your data never leaves the device. Entry tile in Insights.

Big update. Report: GPX export to Files, shareable walk card, weather on every walk, splits vs your personal median. Insights: goal-hit calendar, hourly rhythm, weekday pattern, pace histogram, achievements and NEW RECORD moments. Map: follow-mode cycle with course-up rotation, numbered km markers with split times, instant GPS pace, deeper night tiles. Home: streak strip.

Walk tracking fix: distance now accumulates on slow walks (it could stay at 0 before). New: real elevation and climb in the live HUD, compass heading readout, clearer cadence labels, YOU marker on the pace ruler.

Live Walk overhaul: GPS is warm from app launch so your location is pinned instantly, no more black screen on start, accuracy ring stays locked to your position at every zoom, the puck now rotates with your compass, and a stuck GPS search can always be exited. New: Profile tab with body details, goals, units, export and backup restore.
Fixes: deliberate walk start, live map tracking, accuracy ring at every zoom, real pace. New: beautiful Walk Report, Insights with trends and records, automatic on-device backup.
All-new Sunset Instrument design: amber dashboard, immersive Live Walk map with honest GPS accuracy ring, one-tap Walk button.
New Home dashboard with live weather, goal rings, streaks and living widgets.
